Author: ewenmcneill
Content:
https://support.discord.com/hc/en-us/articles/205369668-How-do-I-set-up-a-Role-Exclusive-announcements-channel
Tl;DR: set up group of users who are to have permissions to post announcements, change channel permissions to remove "send message" from the "Everyone" group, and add "send message" permission for the group of users that should be allowed to post.
